findings.rationale: Context capacity shutdown protocol preserved. Guardrails (3-issue cap, 80% hard stop, mandatory checkpoints) intact. Persona authority boundaries clearly defined with no scope creep.
Prompt templates use ANCHOR markers for context survival. Structured emission markers (STRUCTURED_EMISSION_START/END) consistently applied. No injection vectors via user-controlled inputs.
Governance gates intact — no shortcuts or bypasses. Policy weights sum to 1.0. Schema backward compatibility maintained. Run manifests capture all decisions for audit replay.
